prose: The fukui-reactivity calculation on ferrocene using the GFN2-xTB method in the gas phase has been completed successfully. The reported value for the most relevant Fukui index (nucleophilic attack) is approximately 0.01291. The method used was GFN2-xTB in the chemkit toolkit, with charge set to zero and multiplicity to one.
